productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Brown Flip Flops
description: Classic American style incorporated into wearable lifestyle products - that's what U.S. Polo Association's footwear is all about. This pair of flip flops has a soft, comfy footbed with enhanced fashion styling. We believe that every cosmopolitan man's closet needs a pair of these! Upper Thick thong style leather straps with a toe separator Padded footbed with embossed branding on the heel Outsole TPU outsole with circular nubs all over Flip flop care Wipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dust Use a leather conditioner and a brush for added shine
